title: Basic Principles
content:
Basic Principles

Istanbul Esenyurt University, which accepts the goal of bringing Turkey and the Turkish nation to the most advanced level of civilization under the leadership of reason and science as the most basic value in the light of the principles and revolutions of the Great Leader Mustafa Kemal Ataturk,

Innovation

Modernity,

Transparency,

Student orientation,

Technology and science orientation,

Academic and scientific originality,

Respect for the environment,

Respect for ethical values,

Sustainable development,

Respect for the culture and traditions of our country,

Justice,

Participation,

He has adopted the principles and concepts as his basic values.

This content was updated on 05/07/2024.
